title: Quectel 5G / ISP Monitor (RM520N-GL)
description: ISP upstream health + Quectel RM520N-GL radio state + 5g-watchdog. Generated by quectel-5g-tools/grafana/generate.py.

targets.expr:
label_join(
  max by (band, role, pci, technology, enodeb, cell_id) (modem_cell_state),
  "uid", "_", "band", "role", "pci", "technology"
) == 1

label_join(
  max by (band, role, pci, technology) (modem_signal_rsrp_dbm),
  "uid", "_", "band", "role", "pci", "technology"
)

label_join(
  max by (band, role, pci, technology) (modem_signal_rsrq_db),
  "uid", "_", "band", "role", "pci", "technology"
)

label_join(
  max by (band, role, pci, technology) (modem_signal_sinr_db),
  "uid", "_", "band", "role", "pci", "technology"
)

label_join(
  sum by (band, role, pci, technology) (modem_bandwidth_mhz{direction="dl"}),
  "uid", "_", "band", "role", "pci", "technology"
)

panels.description:
Signal Quality / Noise

How "clean" the signal is. This is the most critical metric for throughput.
panels.title: SINR

panels.description: Signal Strength - how "loud" the tower is
panels.title: RSRP

panels.description:
Signal Quality / Congestion.

Measures the quality of the received reference signal. It often drops when the tower is fully loaded (congestion).
